About Northvale

A Property Management Company That Puts Owners First

We built Northvale around one belief: property owners deserve a management partner that is structured, transparent, and results-driven.

Our Approach

Built on Structure, Transparency, and Trust

Northvale was founded to address what property owners have long experienced in the management industry: inconsistency, poor communication, and a lack of accountability.

Our model is built around clear processes, dedicated professionals, and a genuine commitment to protecting your investment and your rental income at every stage.

1,100+
Rental Transactions Supported

Our Values

What Sets Us Apart

Owner-First Approach

Every decision we make is guided by what is best for the property owner. We act as your partner, not just a vendor.

Proactive Communication

You will never wonder what is happening with your property. We keep you informed with regular updates and detailed monthly reports.

Rigorous Tenant Screening

We apply a thorough multi-point screening process to every tenant application, reducing default risk from day one.

Income Protection Focus

From screening through to rent collection and our income protection program, safeguarding your rental income is central to what we do.

Ready to Work With Northvale?

Book a call and discover how a more structured approach to property management can work for you.

Our Process

How It Works

A clear, structured five-step process that takes you from consultation to professionally managed property.

1

Schedule Your Call

We begin with a no-obligation call to understand your property, your goals, and your current situation. This helps us recommend the right service level and set clear expectations from the start.

2

Property Assessment & Onboarding

We conduct a thorough assessment of your property, documenting its current condition and identifying any items to address before tenant placement. We then onboard you into our management system and set up your owner portal.

3

Tenant Marketing & Screening

Your property is professionally photographed and listed across all major rental platforms. We manage all inquiries, schedule and conduct showings, and apply our rigorous multi-point screening process to every applicant.

4

Lease Execution & Move-In

We prepare the tenancy agreement, collect first and last month's rent, and conduct a detailed move-in condition report with the tenant. All documents are stored securely in your owner portal.

5

Ongoing Management & Reporting

Once your tenant is in place, we handle all day-to-day management — rent collection, maintenance coordination, tenant communication, and regular property inspections. You receive detailed monthly statements and annual summaries.

Start the Process Today

Book a call and take the first step toward professionally managed, protected rental income.

Support

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to the most common questions from property owners about our services, process, and policies.

We manage residential properties throughout the Greater Toronto Area including Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Burlington, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, and Barrie.
Our property management plans start at $89 per month for multi-unit properties, with rates for single-family homes and condominiums available on request. Please contact us to discuss the right plan for your property and situation.
We run a multi-point screening process on every applicant including credit checks, employment verification, income confirmation (typically requiring 2.5–3× monthly rent in gross income), rental history review, and personal reference checks. We present you with our findings and recommendation before making any placement decision.
For tenant placement pricing and details, please contact us directly. We'll provide you with a custom quote based on your specific property and placement needs.
Rental income is collected from the tenant and disbursed to you by direct deposit, typically within 3–5 business days of collection. You will receive a monthly statement detailing all income and any expenses associated with your property.
We immediately follow up with the tenant upon any missed payment and escalate according to Ontario's Residential Tenancies Act if the issue is not resolved. Owners on our Rental Guarantee plan have additional coverage for non-payment scenarios.
Yes. Many of our clients transition to Northvale mid-tenancy. We handle the communication with your existing tenant, document the current state of the tenancy, and take over management seamlessly.
We conduct regular property inspections (frequency depends on your plan), providing detailed written reports with photos documenting the property's condition. Inspections are always conducted with proper written notice to the tenant in accordance with Ontario law.
Rental Guarantee is an add-on service that provides coverage if your tenant defaults on rent. It can include rent guarantee payments, eviction cost coverage, legal expense assistance, and vacancy period protection. Contact us for full details on current plan terms and coverage amounts.

Still Have Questions?

Book a call and speak directly with a member of our property management team.

Our Services

Tenant Placement

Expert tenant finding, screening, and placement — a complete one-time service for property owners who want the right tenant placed properly.

What We Do

Professional Placement, Start to Finish

Our Tenant Placement service handles the entire process of finding and securing a qualified tenant for your property. From professional listing and marketing through to lease execution, we manage every step.

This is a standalone, one-time service. You're not required to sign up for ongoing management — though many clients choose to add management after experiencing our process.

1,100+
Tenants Successfully Placed
Book a Call

Service Details

What's Included

Professional Photography

High-quality photography that presents your property at its best across all listing platforms.

Multi-Platform Listing

Listed on all major Canadian rental platforms to maximize exposure and attract qualified applicants.

Tenant Screening

Full credit, employment, and income verification with a detailed screening report provided to you.

Reference Checks

Previous landlord and personal reference verification to build a complete picture of each applicant.

Lease Preparation

Preparation of a legally compliant Ontario Standard Lease with any necessary additional terms.

Move-In Condition Report

Detailed photo condition report completed at move-in to protect you in any future disputes.

Why Choose Northvale

The Value of Expert Placement

Reduce Default Risk

Our rigorous screening process identifies financially stable, reliable tenants who are far less likely to default on rent.

Faster Vacancy Resolution

Professional marketing and coordinated showings get your property leased faster than most DIY landlords can achieve.

Avoid Costly Mistakes

Legal compliance and proper documentation protect you from future disputes with your tenant.

Our Services

Property Management

Full-service, ongoing management for residential property owners who want professional oversight without the day-to-day burden.

Full-Service Management

We Manage. You Collect.

Northvale handles every aspect of managing your rental property — from tenant communication and rent collection to maintenance coordination, inspections, and financial reporting.

Our management plans are designed to give you complete visibility into your property's performance while removing the operational burden entirely from your plate.

$89
Starting monthly flat fee
Book a Call

Service Breakdown

What's Included

Rent Collection & Disbursement

We collect rent on your behalf and disburse funds to you by direct deposit with a monthly statement.

Maintenance Coordination

We receive, triage, and coordinate all maintenance requests using our trusted vendor network.

Tenant Communication

All day-to-day tenant communication is handled by our team, freeing you from direct involvement.

Monthly Financial Reporting

Detailed monthly statements and an online owner portal provide full visibility into your property's finances.

Regular Inspections

Scheduled property inspections with detailed photo reports to monitor condition and compliance.

Lease Renewals & Rent Reviews

We manage all lease renewals and advise on appropriate rent increases in accordance with Ontario guidelines.

Why It Works

The Benefits of Professional Management

Protect Your Investment

Regular inspections and prompt maintenance prevent small issues from becoming expensive problems.

Maximize Income

Proactive rent reviews, low vacancy rates, and consistent collection keep your income optimized.

Stay Compliant

We stay current with Ontario's Residential Tenancies Act to ensure your property is always managed legally.

Our Services

Rental Guarantee

Guard your rental income against tenant default. Our income protection program gives landlords financial security and peace of mind.

Income Protection

Your Income, Protected.

Even with the best tenant screening, unexpected circumstances can lead to missed rent payments. Northvale's Rental Guarantee plan provides a financial safety net so your income continues even when your tenant doesn't pay.

Available as an add-on to our Property Management service, this plan covers you for rent arrears, legal expenses, and eviction costs.

Book a Call

Coverage Details

What's Covered

Rent Guarantee Payments

We cover rent arrears up to a specified monthly maximum while the default situation is being resolved.

Eviction Support & Costs

Coverage for the costs associated with LTB applications, hearings, and the eviction enforcement process.

Legal Expense Coverage

Assistance with legal fees related to tenant default disputes under Ontario's Residential Tenancies Act.

Vacancy Period Protection

Coverage for lost income during the transition period between a problem tenancy ending and a new tenant being placed.

Fast Claims Processing

Our team handles the claims process on your behalf, minimizing delays and keeping your cash flow protected.

Dedicated Support

A dedicated point of contact guides you through every step of any claim or default situation.

Tenant Replacement

If a tenancy ends due to default, we handle the full tenant replacement process at no additional placement fee — getting your property re-rented fast.

Why It Matters

Income Protection That Works

Sleep Soundly

With coverage in place, you know your income is protected even if unexpected tenant issues arise.

Reduce Stress

Our team handles the entire claims and support process, so you don't have to worry about the details.

Maximize ROI

Protect your rental income investment with affordable coverage designed specifically for Ontario landlords.

Protect Your Rental Income Today

Book a call to learn more about our income protection plans and find the right coverage for your property.

Find Your Next Home

Renting Should Feel Like a Fresh Start.

At Northvale, we believe finding a great home should be straightforward — not stressful. Our leasing team is here to guide you from your first showing all the way to move-in day, with complete transparency at every step.

We manage quality residential properties across Toronto and the GTA, and we take pride in responding quickly, communicating clearly, and treating every applicant with respect.

See Required Documents Contact Us

Quality Homes.

Trusted Management.

Toronto & GTA

Why Rent With Northvale

What Makes Us Different

Fast, Responsive Team

We respond to inquiries quickly and keep you informed throughout the leasing process — no chasing, no silence.

Fair & Transparent Process

We screen fairly under Ontario's Human Rights Code. Our criteria are clear and every applicant is treated with respect.

Well-Maintained Properties

Our properties are professionally managed and maintained. You'll have a dedicated team to handle maintenance requests promptly.

Simple & Clear

Three Steps to Your New Home

1

Book a Showing

Find a listing that interests you and reach out to schedule a viewing. We offer flexible times to fit your schedule, including evenings and weekends.

2

Submit Your Application

Complete the rental application and upload your supporting documents. We review every application thoroughly and keep you updated throughout.

3

Sign & Move In

Once approved, we prepare your lease, collect first & last month, and walk you through your move-in condition report. You're home.

Ongoing Support

You're Not Alone After Move-In

Northvale's property management team remains your point of contact throughout your entire tenancy. Whether it's a maintenance request, a lease renewal question, or a billing inquiry — we're always reachable.

We believe a well-supported tenant makes for a better tenancy for everyone. Our team typically responds to requests within one business day.

Online maintenance request portal
Direct email & phone access to your manager
Lease renewal handled proactively

What to Prepare Before Applying

Getting your documents ready in advance speeds up the process significantly. Here's a quick overview of what you'll typically need:

Government-Issued Photo ID
2–3 Recent Pay Stubs
Employment Letter

Privacy PolicyTerms of Service

For Tenants

Required Documents

To process your rental application smoothly, please have the following documents ready before you apply.

Application Checklist

Documents You'll Need

Identity Verification

Government-Issued Photo ID

Driver's licence, passport, or provincial ID card. Two pieces of ID preferred.

Social Insurance Number (SIN)

Required for the credit check portion of the application. Stored securely and used only for screening purposes.

Proof of Income

Recent Pay Stubs (last 2–3)

For employed applicants. Shows current income level and employment status.

Employment Letter

A letter from your employer confirming your position, employment type (full-time, part-time, contract), and salary.

Notice of Assessment (NOA)

Most recent CRA Notice of Assessment from your tax filing. Required for self-employed applicants or as a supplement to pay stubs.

Bank Statements (optional)

Last 2–3 months of bank statements may be requested for self-employed applicants or to support your application.

Rental History

Previous Landlord References

Contact information for your current and/or previous landlord. We will reach out to verify your tenancy history.

Current Lease Agreement (if applicable)

A copy of your existing lease helps confirm your current living situation and expected move-out date.

All documents are handled in accordance with Ontario's privacy legislation. Personal information is used solely for rental application screening and is never shared with third parties.

Ready to Get Started?

Apply for a Rental Today

Have your documents ready? Contact us or browse our current listings to find your next home.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 1, 2026

1. Who We Are

Northvale Property Management ("Northvale," "we," "us," or "our") is a residential property management company operating in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada. We are committed to protecting the privacy and personal information of all individuals we interact with, including property owners, prospective and current tenants, and website visitors.

Contact: info@northvalepm.com · 145 1/2 Church St Unit 5, Toronto, Ontario, M5B 1Y4

2. What Information We Collect

We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us, including:

  • Contact information: name, email address, phone number, city.
  • Rental application information: employment details, income documentation, credit information, rental history, and government-issued identification — collected solely for tenant screening purposes.
  • Communication records: emails, messages, or inquiries you send us.
  • Website usage data: browser type, pages visited, and time spent on our site, collected via standard analytics tools.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use your personal information to:

  • Respond to your inquiries and provide the services you request.
  • Process and evaluate rental applications in accordance with Ontario's Residential Tenancies Act and Human Rights Code.
  • Manage tenancy agreements and ongoing property management services.
  • Communicate important updates about your tenancy or property.
  • Improve our website and service quality.

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

4. Legal Basis & Compliance

We collect and process personal information in compliance with:

  • Ontario's Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act (FIPPA)
  • Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)
  • Ontario's Human Rights Code — we do not collect information about race, gender, religion, family status, or any other prohibited ground in the context of tenant screening.

5. Tenant Application Data

Personal information collected as part of a rental application (including SIN, income documents, and credit reports) is used solely to assess your suitability as a tenant for a specific property. This information:

  • Is accessed only by authorized Northvale staff involved in the screening process.
  • Is stored securely and not shared with the property owner or any third party without your consent, except as required by law.
  • Is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected.

6. Data Retention

We retain personal information only as long as necessary for the purposes outlined above or as required by applicable law. Tenant application data for unsuccessful applicants is securely deleted within 90 days of a final decision.

7. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to the personal information we hold about you.
  • Request corrections to inaccurate or incomplete information.
  • Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent.
  • Request deletion of your information, subject to legal retention obligations.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@northvalepm.com.

8. Security

We implement reasonable physical, administrative, and technical safeguards to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. No transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

9. Third-Party Services

Our website may use third-party tools (such as Formspree for form submissions or Google Analytics for website analytics). These services have their own privacy policies, and we encourage you to review them.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the updated version on this page with a revised "last updated" date. Continued use of our website or services after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

11. Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal information, please contact:

Northvale Property Management
145 1/2 Church St Unit 5, Toronto, Ontario, M5B 1Y4
info@northvalepm.com
(416) 342-3133

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: January 1, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using the Northvale Property Management website (northvalepm.com) or contacting us through any channel, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website or services.

2. About Our Services

Northvale Property Management provides residential property management services in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area, including tenant placement, full-service property management, and rental guarantee programs. The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes and does not constitute legal, financial, or real estate advice.

3. Website Use

You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others. You may not:

  • Use the website to transmit spam, malware, or harmful content.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of our systems.
  • Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or harvest content without our written consent.
  • Reproduce or redistribute any content from this website without permission.

4. Contact Form & Inquiries

When you submit a contact form or inquiry, you consent to Northvale using your provided information to respond to your request and, where applicable, to send relevant updates about our services. You may opt out of communications at any time by emailing info@northvalepm.com.

5. Rental Applications

Submitting a rental application through Northvale does not guarantee tenancy. All applications are subject to screening criteria and availability. Northvale reserves the right to accept or decline any application in compliance with Ontario's Human Rights Code and Residential Tenancies Act.

6. No Legal or Financial Advice

Nothing on this website constitutes legal, financial, tax, or investment advice. You should consult qualified professionals before making decisions based on information found here.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos, and design — is the property of Northvale Property Management and is protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Northvale Property Management shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or our services. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the specific service giving rise to the claim.

9. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites and encourage you to review their terms and policies independently.

10. Governing Law

These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Ontario.

11. Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to update these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with a revised date. Continued use of our website following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

12. Contact

Northvale Property Management
